name: ndsc-scripts
description: Standalone maintenance/migration scripts for the NDSC platform. Not part of the Next.js app build — run these directly with node from the project root, e.g. `node scripts/list-admins.js`.
notes: @supabase/supabase-js is not listed here — it's already a root app dependency and resolves fine from node_modules up the tree. Run `npm install` inside this scripts/ folder once to get dotenv, then run scripts from the project root, e.g. `node scripts/list-admins.js`.
